# Krynn Tools

> 100+ free online tools for PDF, Image, Text, Developer, Design, Calculators & Security. Fast, private, works in your browser. No signup required.

## About
Krynn Tools is a free collection of 100+ online utilities. All tools run entirely in your browser — files never leave your device. Built with Next.js and React.

## Tool Categories
- PDF Tools: Compress, merge, split, convert, OCR PDF files
- Image Tools: Compress, resize, crop, rotate, convert images
- Text Tools: Word counter, character counter, case converter, text diff
- Developer Tools: JSON formatter, Base64 encoder, UUID generator, regex tester
- Web Design Tools: CSS gradient generator, box shadow generator, color palette
- Calculators: BMI, age, percentage, loan EMI, currency converter
- Security Tools: Password generator, hash generator, QR code generator
- Misc Tools: Dice roller, spinner wheel, barcode generator, internet speed test
- Social Media Tools: Instagram bio counter, username validator, image resizer

## Key Features
- 100% client-side processing — files never leave your device
- No signup or account required
- Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
- Free forever with no limits

## Website
https://krynntools.online
